title: [E2E] Frontend Application Initialization via XAPI
ac10_note: Module-gated queries produce zero console errors. One adjacent pre-existing query (GetPromotionCoupons) lacks @needsModule directive and produces HTTP 400 on /cart — surfaced by the new gating system but not introduced by it. Logged as F1 finding for dev follow-up; not blocking sign-off.

real_flag_test.method: PUT /api/stores (Platform REST, Admin SPA UI bypassed)
real_flag_test.verdict: Backend half of the feature-flag capability ships correctly; frontend half is not wired — per-store flag has no consumer in vc-frontend

items.summary: GetPromotionCoupons.graphql missing @needsModule(name:VirtoCommerce.XMarketing) — fires unconditionally and returns HTTP 400 when xMarketing not installed
Manifest cache is domain-scoped, not user/org-scoped; no invalidation on sign-in/out/org-switch
Empty modules:[] is non-fatal — app degrades gracefully
Module versions are NOT surfaced in storefront UI (only theme version visible in footer)
localStorage cache key includes :v1: suffix — no documented migration path for future schema bumps
PDP qty stepper acts as Add-to-Cart on B2B (pre-existing per feedback_qty_stepper_as_add_to_cart) — not a regression

Per-store feature flag WhiteLabeling.WhiteLabelingEnabled exposed in PR-66 capability manifest but not consumed by vc-frontend PR-2293; toggling it OFF leaves storefront visually unchanged and the whiteLabelingSettings fragment still gets requested. Backend ships; frontend wiring missing. Recommend either a @needsFlag client directive or gating useWhiteLabeling() / useThemeContext() on the flag.

jira_action.comment_summary: Test summary + F1 noted for dev follow-up; status left as Testing per QA agreement
